message:
fix(ssh,config): decouple smol from async-asupersync runtime path (ft-brc7d.5)

Make smol an optional dependency in frankenterm-ssh, only required for
the async-smol fallback feature. When async-asupersync is active, the
runtime::channel module re-exports async-channel (which has an identical
API to smol::channel) instead.

Changes:
- frankenterm-ssh: smol made optional (dep:smol), gated on async-smol
- frankenterm-ssh: async-channel added as optional dep for async-asupersync
- frankenterm-ssh: runtime::channel feature-gated (async_channel vs smol)
- frankenterm-ssh: removed async-smol from async-asupersync feature
- config: removed transitive async-smol from async-asupersync feature
- Added 2 migration guard tests verifying smol gating and optionality

Both async-asupersync (no smol in dep chain) and async-smol (fallback)
paths compile and pass all 5 migration guard tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,13 +13,14 @@ publish = false
 
 [features]
 default = ["libssh-rs", "ssh2", "async-smol"]
-async-smol = ["async_ossl/async-io", "frankenterm-uds/async-io"]
-# Transitional: keep smol active until source-level runtime migration lands.
+async-smol = ["dep:smol", "async_ossl/async-io", "frankenterm-uds/async-io"]
 async-asupersync = [
     "dep:asupersync",
+    "dep:async-channel",
     "async_ossl/async-asupersync",
+    "async_ossl/async-io",
     "frankenterm-uds/async-asupersync",
-    "async-smol",
+    "frankenterm-uds/async-io",
 ]
 vendored-openssl = ["ssh2/vendored-openssl", "libssh-rs/vendored-openssl"]
 vendored-openssl-ssh2 = ["ssh2/vendored-openssl"]
@@ -42,7 +43,8 @@ log.workspace = true
 portable-pty.workspace = true
 regex.workspace = true
 asupersync = { workspace = true, optional = true }
-smol.workspace = true
+async-channel = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+smol = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 socket2.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 ssh2 = {workspace=true, features=["openssl-on-win32"], optional = true}
